channel.title: CaptiMac Updates
channel.description: Most recent CaptiMac releases with links to updates.

item.title: CaptiMac v2.3-beta.3 (2304)
item.description:
🆕 What's New

  • Apple Tips Onboarding — 9 interactive tips guide you through CaptiMac
  • Developer ID Distribution — works on any Mac, notarized by Apple
  • Multi-Provider Transcription — Groq + OpenAI + ElevenLabs

🔧 Improvements

  • Ollama download with real-time progress + cancel
  • Coverage audit: 97% accuracy for all languages
  • Provider switch isolation — no more stale URLs

🐛 Bug Fixes

  • CapCut MP3 export now works
  • Fase 2 tips overlay animation fixed
  • Sparkle update from public repo (no more 404)
